response.justification: Despite 20 years of varied engineering experience that satisfies the tenure floor, the candidate has no demonstrated depth in AI or ML — the only AI-related work appears in the most recent two months at the current employer — and no cloud platform strategy background or director-level advisory experience; the role requires recognized AI expertise, strategic customer advising, and thought leadership that this profile does not evidence.
strengths: 20+ years of broad engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Entrepreneurial track record with a self-founded open-source geo-data platform serving real NGO users
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML depth — AI work is confined to the last two months and is tooling-level, not product or platform ownership
No cloud architecture or cloud platform strategy experience; AWS CDK usage is implementation-level, not strategic
No director-level IC, recognized thought leadership, or strategic customer advisory track record
